title: Second fire in Bossiesgif detroys 20 homes
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A second fire within...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A second fire within three days in Bossiesgif has destroyed about 20 homes.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A second fire within three days in Bossiesgif has destroyed about 20 homes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The fire started shortly after 01:00 this morning, Thursday 7 August. According to Bitou Municipality's communications manager, Andile Namntu, the cause of the fire is still being investigated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There were no fatalities or injuries and initial estimates are that about 48 people were affected.","html":"There were no fatalities or injuries and initial estimates are that about 48 people were affected."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are working on establishing the final details,” says Namntu.","html":"“We are working on establishing the final details,” says Namntu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou fire services managed to contain the fire within an hour and humanitarian relief is being provided.","html":"Bitou fire services managed to contain the fire within an hour and humanitarian relief is being provided."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"First fireIn the early hours of Monday morning, a fire in Bossiesgif destroyed 165 houses, affecting between 400 and 500 people.","html":"First fire
In the early hours of Monday morning, a fire in Bossiesgif destroyed 165 houses, affecting between 400 and 500 people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Relief operations are continuing unabated as volunteer groups, including the Dignity Fund and Gift of the Givers, provide relief to both Monday’s and today’s fire victims.","html":"Relief operations are continuing unabated as volunteer groups, including the Dignity Fund and Gift of the Givers, provide relief to both Monday’s and today’s fire victims."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mario Ferreira of Gift of the givers said the organisation provided essential items such as blankets, mattresses, food parcels, hygiene packs, toiletries and nappies.","html":"Mario Ferreira of Gift of the givers said the organisation provided essential items such as blankets, mattresses, food parcels, hygiene packs, toiletries and nappies."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Ferreira said since Monday, the community has been intensely involved in providing relief."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gift of the Givers, in conjunction with Shoprite Checkers, has also organised soup kitchens.","html":"Gift of the Givers, in conjunction with Shoprite Checkers, has also organised soup kitchens."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VolunteersCindy Truyens, responsible for housing and food provision by the Dignity Fund, also notes the overwhelming community support in bringing relief to the fire victims. When they put out a call for more volunteer to assist, the response has been brilliant, she says, and the Dignity Fund is thankfully in a position to absorb the extra people affected by the latest fire.","html":"Volunteers
Cindy Truyens, responsible for housing and food provision by the Dignity Fund, also notes the overwhelming community support in bringing relief to the fire victims. When they put out a call for more volunteer to assist, the response has been brilliant, she says, and the Dignity Fund is thankfully in a position to absorb the extra people affected by the latest fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous Articles","html":"Previous Articles"},{"type":"list","items":["Calling for support after destruction of over 100 structures in fires","Bossiesgif and Smutsville fires aftermath"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Second fire in Bossiesgif detroys 20 homes
